Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I enjoyed a cup of Pheromone Coffee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It feels like people are looking at me...[n]Is this the effect of pheromones...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It had an enchanting aroma.[n]I feel a little more mature now...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My reflection in the window looks[n]more attractive than before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Strangely, I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]has increased after drinking the coffee...[n]{f 1 1}
